text: hi this video is of left sided laparoscopic nephrectomy during nephrectomy after dissection of pedicle we are applying hemolog clip but suddenly what we found after loading the clip the clip applicator was not functioning you can see We are trying to close the clip applicator, but clip applicator Is not closing so in this situation The question arise how to clamp this large vane So the next step is use thread silk thread This video is going to demonstrate how

The surgeon ties the pedicle using a silk thread due to a malfunctioning hemoloclip applicator. The thread is passed behind the vein and brought out from the upper end, followed by tying a surgical knot with careful attention to the knot's direction.

The surgeon places multiple knots using silk thread on the renal vein. Three titanium clips are applied: one above and one below the knot, and another on the upper part of the vein towards the kidney to prevent retrograde blood flow. The renal vein is then cut, revealing one knot and two clips in place.
